_comment: PLACEHOLDER example roster — committed for documentation/tests ONLY. All data is fake (note the obviously-fake student_ids/names/phones). NEVER put real student data in this or any tracked file; the real store is gitignored (students.local.json) or a live SIS. Schema: student-profile.schema.json. Policy: student-data-policy.md.

health_plans.action_plan_ref: PLACEHOLDER-AAP-2026 (the student's signed Allergy & Anaphylaxis Action Plan)
health_plans.emergency_protocol: Per the signed plan: on signs of anaphylaxis, administer the auto-injector and call 911; notify the school nurse and guardians.
health_plans.when_where_to_administer: EXAMPLE/PLACEHOLDER text — the ACTUAL when/where comes verbatim from the student's signed plan; do not rely on this example.
health_plans.source: signed Allergy & Anaphylaxis Action Plan on file with the school nurse

access.note: Surfaced to staff with legitimate educational interest; medical specifics defer to the nurse / signed plan / 911.
IEP specifics validate against the student's actual plan; placeholders only here.
